schedule.title: Weekly Schedule
schedule.selectEmployeePlaceholder: Select an employee to view or edit their schedule

errors.loadEmployeesError: Failed to load employees for schedule.

notifications.savePartial: Schedule partially updated. {success} of {total} operations succeeded.

checkinCode.title: Checkin Code
checkinCode.description: {name} uses this code at the restaurant QR kiosk to clock in/out.
checkinCode.confirmRegenerate: Generate a new code? The current code will stop working immediately.

notifications.generated: Checkin code generated. Give this code to the employee.

restaurantQr.title: Restaurant Check-in QR
restaurantQr.description: Print and display this QR in your branch. Employees scan it to clock in/out.
restaurantQr.confirmRotate: Rotate QR code? All employees will need to re-scan. The old QR becomes invalid.

notifications.rotated: Restaurant QR code rotated. Print and display the new code.

payroll.title: Payroll
payroll.empty: No payroll records for this month.

attendance.selectEmployeePlaceholder: Select an employee to view attendance
attendance.promptSelectEmployee: Please select an employee to view their attendance records.
attendance.noRecordsFound: No attendance records found for the selected employee and month.

qrPanel.title: Attendance QR Code
qrPanel.description: QR code for {name}. The employee scans this to check in or out.
qrPanel.noCredential: No QR credential has been issued yet for this employee.
qrPanel.confirmRotate: Rotating the QR code will invalidate the old one immediately. Continue?
qrPanel.rotateWarning: Rotating the QR code will invalidate the old code immediately. The employee will need to use the new code.

notifications.rotated: QR credential rotated. Old code is now invalid.

summaries.title: Attendance Summaries
summaries.noSummaries: No attendance summaries found for the selected filters.
summaries.exceptionNote: Rows highlighted in orange have exceptions (missing check-out, manual correction, or unusual hours). Review these before approving.

approvalInbox.empty: No pending attendance to review. All caught up!
approvalInbox.exceptionNote: Items with an orange triangle have exceptions. Review the notes before approving.

qrScannerModal.initializing: Initializing QR scanner and requesting camera access...

errors.permissionDenied: Camera permission was denied. Please enable camera access in your browser settings.

notifications.scanApiError: Could not process scan. Please check the QR code or try again.
